messages.text: Students, the lab exam for Embedded Systems is scheduled for June 20th. You need to prepare all 10 lab programs. Viva will cover ARM architecture and interfacing concepts.
Can anyone share the GPIO interfacing code from Lab 7? My board wasn't working during the session.
Assignment 3 marks have been uploaded on VTOP. Those who scored below 15/25 should meet me during office hours (Wed 2-4 PM).
CAT 2 syllabus: Syntax-directed translation, intermediate code generation, and code optimization (Units 3-4). Open book — only handwritten notes allowed.
Has anyone done the three-address code practice problems from Chapter 6? I'm stuck on the nested loop optimization part.
I made notes for Unit 3 and 4. Sharing the Google Drive link: [drive link]. Feel free to add corrections!
Reminder: Assignment 4 on Hypothesis Testing is due this Friday (June 16th) by 11:59 PM. Submit on Moodle. Late submissions won't be accepted.
Anyone free to discuss the Bayes theorem problems? I keep getting the posterior probability wrong for the medical test question.
CAT 2 results are out on VTOP. Class average was 28/50. Those below 20 should focus on Regression and Hypothesis Testing for the FAT.
Lab 5 (Page Replacement Algorithms) deadline extended to June 28th. Implement FIFO, LRU, and Optimal. Viva during next lab slot.
Pro tip: For the LRU implementation, use a doubly linked list + hashmap. Much faster than scanning the whole list each time.
Tomorrow's class will cover Transport Layer protocols (TCP/UDP). Read Kurose Chapter 3 sections 3.4-3.7 beforehand. Quiz at the start of class.
Project Phase 2 submissions: ER diagram + normalization (up to 3NF) due June 22nd. Groups of 3 max. No solo submissions.
Updated timetable for next week: DBMS lab shifted from Thursday to Friday 2-4 PM due to faculty conference. Rest remains same.
Hostel room allocation for next semester starts from June 30th. Check VTOP for details. Priority based on CGPA.
Team registrations still open for Smart India Hackathon 2026. Deadline June 20th. Need teams of 6. DM me if you're looking for a team.
Microsoft visiting campus on July 5th. Eligible: CGPA > 8.0, no active backlogs. Register on Superset by June 25th. Roles: SDE Intern, PM Intern.
This week's paper: 'Attention Is All You Need'. Meeting Sunday 4 PM in LH-301. Bring your annotated copy. We'll discuss implementation details after.
Codeforces Round #950 tonight at 8:30 PM IST. Good problems on graphs and DP expected. Let's do a virtual contest together in the lab?
Study group for Embedded lab exam? I'm free tomorrow 6-8 PM. We can meet at the library and go through all programs together.
